search_terms_used: lactate threshold training running performance adaptations systematic review
tempo running training MLSS maximal lactate steady state endurance performance
Beneke 2011 blood lactate diagnostics exercise testing training
Jones critical power concept endurance exercise review
coverage_notes: Good coverage of lactate threshold concepts (Faude 2009 foundational, Billat 2003 MLSS), critical power paradigm (Jones 2010, Poole 2016), practical training prescription (Beneke 2011, Casado 2023), marathon-specific modeling (Joyner 1991). Limited running-specific RCTs on threshold training — most threshold training evidence comes from polarized/threshold comparison studies in the polarized_training domain.

papers.title: Applied physiology of marathon running
papers.notes: Early comprehensive review of marathon physiology including the role of lactate threshold and OBLA in performance.

papers.title: Modeling: optimal marathon performance on the basis of physiological factors
papers.notes: Modeled marathon performance from VO2max, lactate threshold, and running economy showing a sub-2hr marathon is physiologically possible.

papers.title: The validity of the lactate minimum test for determination of the maximal lactate steady state
papers.notes: Validated the lactate minimum test against MLSS in 13 trained runners and examined physiological predictors of 8km performance.

papers.title: The concept of maximal lactate steady state: a bridge between biochemistry, physiology and sport science
papers.notes: Comprehensive review bridging biochemistry, physiology, and sport science perspectives on the MLSS concept.

papers.title: Maximal lactate steady state as a training stimulus
papers.notes: Examined continuous and intermittent running at MLSS velocity as a training stimulus in 14 moderately trained runners.

papers.title: Lactate threshold concepts: how valid are they?
papers.notes: Critical review of multiple lactate threshold concepts evaluating their physiological validity and practical application.

papers.title: Critical power: implications for determination of VO2max and exercise tolerance
papers.notes: Reviewed the critical power concept as a fatigue threshold with implications for VO2max determination and exercise tolerance.

papers.title: Blood lactate diagnostics in exercise testing and training
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance
papers.notes: Reviewed blood lactate diagnostic methods including various threshold concepts and their application to exercise testing and training prescription.

papers.title: Critical Power: An Important Fatigue Threshold in Exercise Physiology
papers.notes: Updated review of the critical power concept as a fundamental fatigue threshold demarcating heavy from severe exercise domains.

papers.title: Does Lactate-Guided Threshold Interval Training within a High-Volume Low-Intensity Approach Represent the "Next Step" in the Evolution of Distance Running Training?
papers.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
papers.notes: Proposed a lactate-guided threshold interval training model within high-volume low-intensity context for distance running evolution.
